action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py succeeds on val subset (3 objs, camera-aware render with avg elev/dist, nested frames handled, RGBA outputs), but full eval failed with FileNotFound on '/data/test_gt/input.png' (extra dir in data_path treated as object_uid; processed 101 'objects'). No LPIPS score yet. Analysis: filter needed for robustness (only dirs with input.png); TripoSR zero-shot + avg camera params is valid strong baseline for single-image 3D+render task (matches API, model size, no training). Test time ~20s for 3 objs implies full eval ~10-15min (fits budget). Decision: update predict.py with dir filter + trailing '/' in JSON, run quick val test for validation, then submit_eval on best.pt for initial LPIPS/PSNR/SSIM + time measurement before considering fine-tuning.
